# upload

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Upload wallpaper source: contributes the Upload tab to the desktop wallpaper picker, emitting a local image file the picker funnels through the upload endpoint.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Wallpaper.Provider` "Upload"
  - Uses: `apps-core/surface/floating/wallpaper.Wallpaper`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
